transcript_snippet: For the third quarter, we expect revenue growth of 8% year over year. We are maintaining disciplined execution across geographies.
notes: single metric explicit percent guidance

transcript_snippet: We project gross margin at 41.5% in Q4, supported by favorable mix. This remains our central planning assumption.
notes: single metric margin guidance

transcript_snippet: Capex is expected to be around $620 million next fiscal year. We will prioritize data center expansion and automation programs.
notes: single metric capex guidance

transcript_snippet: We anticipate R&D spend of roughly $1.4 billion for fiscal 2021. That level supports our product roadmap milestones.
notes: single metric r-and-d guidance

transcript_snippet: Management now targets hiring approximately 1,200 net new engineers over the next 12 months. We believe this keeps capacity aligned with demand.
notes: single metric hiring plan

transcript_snippet: For Q1, we expect revenue between $5.0 and $5.2 billion and diluted EPS of $1.05 to $1.10. We also see operating margin around 19%.
notes: multi metric with ranges

transcript_snippet: We are guiding cloud segment growth of 22% and total company growth of 11% next quarter. Gross margin should be at least 44%.
notes: multi metric segment plus total plus margin

transcript_snippet: Our outlook calls for free cash flow of $900 million to $1.0 billion, capex near $300 million, and EPS around $0.84 in the second half.
notes: multi metric cash flow capex eps

transcript_snippet: We plan to launch the new platform in October and target 250 enterprise customer wins by year end. Revenue contribution should be modest in Q4.
notes: multi metric operational and financial targets

transcript_snippet: Next quarter we expect subscriptions to grow 14% to 16%, adjusted EPS to be about $2.30, and operating expenses to increase low single digits.
notes: multi metric with mixed numeric formats

transcript_snippet: We believe revenue could improve meaningfully if macro conditions stabilize. Potentially, margins may trend higher over time.
notes: vague hedged statements with no quantification

transcript_snippet: Assuming no major disruptions, we hope to accelerate growth next year. We cannot guarantee timing given customer budget cycles.
notes: hedged language but no numeric metric

transcript_snippet: Management is on track to execute strategy, and we expect strong demand to continue. The team remains confident in long-term positioning.
notes: future language without quantifiable guidance

transcript_snippet: We may see better mix benefits over the coming quarters, contingent on supply normalization. Around this time next year, profitability should improve.
notes: ambiguous outlook without specific values

transcript_snippet: In Q2 we reported revenue of $3.8 billion, up 9% year over year. Diluted EPS was $0.72 and operating margin was 17.4%.
notes: pure historical results only

transcript_snippet: This quarter gross margin came in at 45.2%, and free cash flow was $410 million. We also reduced net debt by $220 million.
notes: past tense actuals no forward guidance

transcript_snippet: We delivered 31% growth in enterprise ARR and added 180 net new logos in the quarter. International revenue was $620 million.
notes: historical performance metrics only

transcript_snippet: For fiscal 2025, we guide revenue to EUR 2.6 to 2.8 billion and EBITDA margin in the 24%-25% range. Capex should stay below EUR 180 million.
notes: edge case non-usd currency and annual guidance

transcript_snippet: Our midpoint outlook implies yen revenue of JPY 420 billion, plus or minus 3%. We target operating profit of at least JPY 52 billion.
notes: edge case plus-minus and yen denomination

transcript_snippet: We expect first-half unit shipments of 1.2 to 1.4 million and full-year market share to be around 11%. Product launch is planned for late Q3.
notes: edge case operational metrics and timeline guidance
